title: Intune Analytics - Database Admin

tiles.title: ⏰ Last Successful Sync
tiles.query:
SyncState
| where Status == 'Success'
| top 1 by IngestionTime desc
| project format_datetime(IngestionTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')

tiles.title: ✅ Sync Status (Last 24h)
tiles.query:
SyncState
| where IngestionTime > ago(24h)
| summarize Success=countif(Status == 'Success'), Failed=countif(Status != 'Success')
| project Status = iff(Failed == 0, '✅ All Good', strcat('⚠️ ', Failed, ' Failed'))

tiles.title: 📊 Total Records (Current Views)
tiles.query:
print Devices=toscalar(ManagedDevices_Current | count),
      Policies=toscalar(CompliancePolicies_Current | count),
      ComplianceStates=toscalar(DeviceComplianceStates_Current | count),
      DeviceScores=toscalar(DeviceScores_Current | count),
      Apps=toscalar(AppReliability_Current | count)

tiles.title: 📅 Data Freshness by Table
tiles.query:
union
  (ManagedDevices | summarize LastIngestion=max(IngestionTime) | extend Table='ManagedDevices'),
  (CompliancePolicies | summarize LastIngestion=max(IngestionTime) | extend Table='CompliancePolicies'),
  (DeviceComplianceStates | summarize LastIngestion=max(IngestionTime) | extend Table='DeviceComplianceStates'),
  (DeviceScores | summarize LastIngestion=max(IngestionTime) | extend Table='DeviceScores'),
  (StartupPerformance | summarize LastIngestion=max(IngestionTime) | extend Table='StartupPerformance'),
  (AppReliability | summarize LastIngestion=max(IngestionTime) | extend Table='AppReliability')
| project Table, LastIngestion, AgeHours=round(datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastIngestion), 1)
| order by AgeHours desc

tiles.title: 📈 Sync History (7 days)
tiles.query:
SyncState
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d)
| summarize Syncs=count(), Records=sum(RecordCount) by bin(IngestionTime, 1d), ExportType
| order by IngestionTime asc

tiles.title: ⏱️ Average Sync Duration
tiles.query:
SyncState
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d) and Status == 'Success'
| summarize AvgDuration=round(avg(DurationSeconds), 1), MaxDuration=round(max(DurationSeconds), 1) by ExportType
| project ExportType, AvgDuration, MaxDuration

tiles.title: 📊 Raw Table vs Current View (Dedup Ratio)
tiles.query:
print
  DevicesRaw=toscalar(ManagedDevices | count),
  DevicesCurrent=toscalar(ManagedDevices_Current | count),
  ComplianceRaw=toscalar(DeviceComplianceStates | count),
  ComplianceCurrent=toscalar(DeviceComplianceStates_Current | count),
  ScoresRaw=toscalar(DeviceScores | count),
  ScoresCurrent=toscalar(DeviceScores_Current | count)
| extend 
  DevicesDedupRatio=round(100.0 * DevicesCurrent / DevicesRaw, 1),
  ComplianceDedupRatio=round(100.0 * ComplianceCurrent / ComplianceRaw, 1),
  ScoresDedupRatio=round(100.0 * ScoresCurrent / ScoresRaw, 1)

tiles.title: ❌ Failed Syncs (Last 7 days)
tiles.query:
SyncState
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d) and Status != 'Success'
| project IngestionTime, ExportType, Status, ErrorMessage
| order by IngestionTime desc

tiles.title: 📈 Daily Ingestion Volume
tiles.query:
SyncState
| where IngestionTime > ago(14d)
| summarize TotalRecords=sum(RecordCount) by bin(IngestionTime, 1d)
| order by IngestionTime asc

tiles.title: 💾 Estimated Table Sizes
tiles.query:
.show table ManagedDevices extents | summarize ExtentCount=count(), SizeMB=round(sum(OriginalSize) / 1024 / 1024, 2) | extend Table='ManagedDevices'
| union (.show table DeviceComplianceStates extents | summarize ExtentCount=count(), SizeMB=round(sum(OriginalSize) / 1024 / 1024, 2) | extend Table='DeviceComplianceStates')
| union (.show table DeviceScores extents | summarize ExtentCount=count(), SizeMB=round(sum(OriginalSize) / 1024 / 1024, 2) | extend Table='DeviceScores')
| union (.show table StartupPerformance extents | summarize ExtentCount=count(), SizeMB=round(sum(OriginalSize) / 1024 / 1024, 2) | extend Table='StartupPerformance')
| project Table, SizeMB, ExtentCount
| order by SizeMB desc

description: Monitor database health, sync status, data freshness, and ingestion metrics. Use this to ensure data is being collected correctly.
